sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79009" key="para/fasis2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παράφᾰσις</orth> (B), <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">παραφαίνομαι</etym>) <sense id="n79009.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">image in a mirror</tr_>, Chalcidius <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">in Ti.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">240</biblScope> </bibl>(<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.273</biblScope> </bibl> Wrobel).</sense> </entryFree>
